entries.CKChatItem: UI wrapper for IMChatItem. Has .IMChatItem property to access backing data model.
entries.CKTranscriptBalloonCell: Main cell class for message bubbles. Receives CKChatItem via configureForChatItem:context:animated:animationDuration:animationCurve:
entries.CKTranscriptCollectionViewController: Manages the message list. Has chatItemForGUID: method to look up items by GUID.
entries.CKAssociatedStickerTranscriptCell: Has _chatItemGUID ivar - stores GUID directly. Accessible via chatItemGUID getter.
entries.IMChatItem.guid: The actual message GUID from chat.db. Accessed via [CKChatItem IMChatItem].guid
entries.CKChatItem.commSafetyMessageGUID: Returns the GUID from underlying IMChatItem. Calls [self IMChatItem].guid - address 0x1d549a280
entries.indexPathForChatItemGUID:: CKTranscriptCollectionViewController method at 0x1d556fe3c - maps GUID to NSIndexPath
entries.chatItemAtIndexPath:: CKTranscriptCollectionViewController method at 0x1d5556504 - returns CKChatItem for given index
entries.balloonViewForChatItemGUID:getChatItem:: CKTranscriptCollectionViewController method at 0x1d557407c - gets balloon view and chat item for GUID
entries.CKIMDaemonController: IPC controller for communicating with imagent daemon. Methods include deleteMessageWithGUIDs:queryID:, sendBalloonPayload:attachments:withMessageGUID:bundleID:
entries.GUID_CHAIN: IMChatItem.guid → CKChatItem.commSafetyMessageGUID → stored in _chatItemGUID ivar on some cells (e.g. CKAssociatedStickerTranscriptCell)
entries.NO_AX_GUID_EXPOSURE: Accessibility identifiers are static strings like 'CKBalloonTextView', 'BigEmojiIdentifier' - NOT dynamic GUIDs. No custom AX attribute exposes the message GUID.
entries.indexPathForAssociatedChatItemGUID:: CKTranscriptCollectionViewController at 0x1d556fe44 - for associated messages (reactions, etc)
entries.scrollToMessageGUID:partIndex:highlight:: CKTranscriptCollectionViewController at 0x1d6098d6b - scrolls to specific message, useful for correlation
